ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2026 Set For Trial On Dec-14-26 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Florence McClain, Esq. of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, Tel No. 415.362.2580; appearing via Zoom for the moving party.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: Florence A. McClain of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Defendants J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc and JM Eagle.

Ms. McClain informs the court that a substitution of attorney was submitted for e-filing on Dec-23-2025 and is awaiting processing. Ms. McClain states that a separate appearance for JM Eagle is not required as JM Eagle was a DBA ("doing business as") in this matter.

At the request of Ms. McClain, the motion is taken off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Ed Santos and Jackie Alameda; Matter not reported; Bailiff: Not Present. (D304)
